name: File Transfer Protocol C2 Communication
description: Detects FTP/SFTP traffic to unusual external hosts potentially used for C2
query:
// Detect FTP-based C2 communication
// Trigger on FTP connections to non-standard external destinations
events from ndr_flow
where destination_port = 21
  or destination_port = 22
  and direction = "outbound"
  and protocol = "TCP"
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) > 5
within 600 seconds
